response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video, identifying the primary performance as "GIRLS' LEGEND U" based on on-screen text and performer activity. 2. Identified the brief transition snippet at the start (00:00-00:45) as associated with the tag "Paradise Lost" but determined that "GIRLS' LEGEND U" is the main focus of the performance within this video clip. 3. Used web search to find the official composer/lyricist metadata for "GIRLS' LEGEND U" and the complete Japanese lyrics. 4. Constructed the JSON object with the detected song title, composer metadata, performer, and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video segment from Omaru Polka's 2026 Birthday Live featuring the full performance of the song "GIRLS' LEGEND U" by the VTubers, with a brief transitional snippet of "Paradise Lost" at the very beginning.

scenes.description: The video starts with a brief transitional snippet of the song "Paradise Lost" (originally by Minami Kuribayashi), quickly followed by the main performance of "GIRLS' LEGEND U" featuring Omaru Polka and other VTubers. Performance continues through the end of the clip.
